title: Senior Teacher - Ratna Sagar - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Ratna Sagar - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!
